languages.text: {n}Внутри Эоганна словно что-то гаснет. Он заметно сдерживает тяжелый вздох, поворачиваясь к пациентам. {/n} "Досадно, что вы не сумели понять мой замысел, но, быть может, он в самом деле был сомнителен. Принимаю ваш вердикт, Лорд-капитан".

{n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}Внутри Эоганна словно что-то гаснет. Он заметно сдерживает тяжелый вздох, поворачиваясь к пациентам. {/n} "Досадно, что вы не сумели понять мой замысел, но, быть может, он в самом деле был сомнителен. Принимаю ваш вердикт, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: {n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."

{n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."

{n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}エオガンはまるで内側から光を失ったかのように、ため息をこらえながら臣下たちに向き直る。{/n}「理解不足に腹が立つが、確かに私の意図は疑わしいものだったかもしれない。判断を受け入れる、船長様」
languages.original_text: {n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオグンはまるで内側から光を失ったかのように、ため息をこらえながら臣下たちに向き直る。「君たちの理解不足に腹が立つが、確かに私の意図は疑わしいものだったかもしれない。君たちの判断を受け入れる、船長様。」{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡仿佛熄灭了内心的光芒。他强压着一声叹息，转身看向实验体。{/n}“您未能理解我的意图，这令人沮丧。不过，或许它确实也有待商榷。我接受您的裁决，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: {n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡仿佛熄灭了内心的光芒。他强压着一声叹息，转身看向实验体。{/n}“您未能理解我的意图，这令人沮丧。不过，或许它确实也有待商榷。我接受您的裁决，舰长大人。”

languages.text: {n}Es como si Eogunn hubiera perdido toda luz. Reprimiendo visiblemente un suspiro, se gira hacia sus sujetos. {/n} «Es frustrante que no haya comprendido mi intención, pero tal vez sí que fuera cuestionable. Acepto su veredicto, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: {n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Es como si Eogunn hubiera perdido toda luz. Reprimiendo visiblemente un suspiro, se gira hacia sus sujetos. {/n} «Es frustrante que no haya comprendido mi intención, pero tal vez sí que fuera cuestionable. Acepto su veredicto, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: {n}Es scheint, als wäre in Eogunn ein Licht erloschen. Mit einem unterdrückten Seufzen wendet er sich zu seinen Subjekten um. {/n} "Es ist frustrierend, dass Ihr meine Absichten nicht versteht, aber vielleicht waren sie ja wirklich fragwürdig. Ich akzeptiere Euer Urteil, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: {n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Es scheint, als wäre in Eogunn ein Licht erloschen. Mit einem unterdrückten Seufzen wendet er sich zu seinen Subjekten um. {/n} "Es ist frustrierend, dass Ihr meine Absichten nicht versteht, aber vielleicht waren sie ja wirklich fragwürdig. Ich akzeptiere Euer Urteil, Lord Captain."

languages.text: {n}Le visage d'Eogunn s'assombrit brusquement. Réprimant un soupir, il se tourne vers ses sujets.{/n} « Il est frustrant que vous ne compreniez pas mes intentions, mais c'est peut-être signe qu'elles étaient discutables. J'accepte votre verdict, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: {n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le visage d'Eogunn s'assombrit brusquement. Réprimant un soupir, il se tourne vers ses sujets. {/n}« Il est frustrant que vous ne compreniez pas mes intentions, mais c'est peut-être signe qu'elles étaient discutables. J'accepte votre verdict, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: {n}Sanki Eogunn'un içinde bir ışık sönüyor. İç çekişini gözle görülür şekilde bastırarak deneklerine dönüyor.{/n} "Niyetimi anlamamanız can sıkıcı ancak belki de gerçekten şüpheli bir durumdu bu. Kararınızı kabul ediyorum Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: {n}It is as if a light has gone out inside Eogunn. Visibly repressing a sigh, he turns to his subjects. {/n} "It is frustrating that you failed to understand my intent, but perhaps it was indeed questionable. I accept your verdict, Lord Captain."
